scenes.text: Strange things began to happen. Each day when Mbok Rondo returned home, warm meals waited on the table and the house was spotless.
Curiosity consumed her. One morning, she pretended to leave but hid behind the wall, watching through a crack.
What she saw took her breath away. A beautiful young woman emerged from the golden shell, moving gracefully through the kitchen cooking, cleaning, caring for the home as if it were her own.
"I am Candra Kirana," she said softly. "A curse turned me into the golden snail you found. It can only be broken by the melody of the sacred gamelan."
